name: Meringue Tarts with Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, combine the egg whites, vanilla extract, vinegar, and lemon zest until foamy.
3. Gradually add the sugar to the egg white mixture, one tablespoon at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Place spoonfuls of batter onto prepared baking sheets and shape into shallow cups.
5. Bake in a 225°F (110°C) oven for 45 minutes to 1 hour until crisp and dry.
6. Remove from the sheet quickly and cool on a rack.
7. Fill with fresh sliced strawberries.
